prompt: Create a handoff for user preferences API (ENG-4521) implementation, phase 2 of 3
assertions: A handoff markdown file was created
The handoff document is under 100 lines total
The YAML frontmatter has 7 or fewer fields
The Learnings section inlines knowledge rather than pointing to files (e.g. describes the pattern, not just says 'see user_repo.go')
The References section has 3 or fewer files in the 'read on resume' tier
The document does NOT have a separate 'Recent changes' or 'Artifacts' section
There is a single clear 'Next Step' rather than a numbered list of 5+ action items
Action items are specific (e.g. 'implement PutPreferences') not vague ('continue working')
The document does not contain code blocks longer than 10 lines
